"总结会议里的关键决策。要求：1. 只总结最关键的会议决策，不总结讨论过程，不总结细枝末节，不总结单纯的工作内容汇报或分享； 2. 以列表的形式总结关键决策，列表的每一项尽量控制在 60 字以内，回答直接以列表开头，不需要有铺垫的信息； 3. 务必保证结论的正确性，会议中间产生的结论可能随后被推翻，注意识别最终决策； 4. 会议结论的表述需要清晰易懂，让没参会的人也能理解，对于多主题的会议，写清楚决策是关于哪个主题的； 5. 如会中无关键决策则向用户说明，分享类会议通常无关键决策，此时简要总结会议关键内容，篇幅不要过长。", "title": "总结会议决策", "type": "meeting_notes_personal_summary", "id": "summary_meeting_decision", "icon": "🔖"}, {"title": "总结发言人的主要观点", "user_prompt": "总结会议里的发言人观点。要求：1. 只总结最主要的观点，不总结细枝末节，注意发言人的询问不算做观点；2. 对于每个发言人的观点总结，先加粗展示名字，再以列表的形式呈现每一项观点，注意表达精简；3. 不需要有任何铺垫信息，直接输出总结；4. 请勿对未发言的用户做总结；5. 不需要输出辅助信息；6. 参考智能纪要或文字记录文档作答", "disable_create_source": [], "tag": "meeting_notes", "type": "meeting_notes_decision", "id": "summary_speakers_content", "icon": "📌"}, {"title": "总结{{name}}的发言", {"800004984": {"ru": "Неверный ответ ИИ. Попробуйте другую команду.", "fr": "Réponse IA non valide. Veuillez essayer une autre requête.", "en": "Invalid AI response. Please try a different prompt.", "zh": "AI 返回结果无效，请调整输入内容后重试", "ms-MY": "Respons AI tidak sah. Sila cuba dengan arahan berbeza.", "pt": "Resposta de IA inválida. Tente um prompt diferente.", "vi": "Phản hồi của AI không hợp lệ. Vui lòng thử với câu lệnh khác.", "de": "Ungültige KI-Antwort. Bitte versuchen Sie es mit einer anderen Eingabe.", "ko": "잘못된 AI 응답입니다. 다른 프롬프트를 시도하세요.", "it": "Risposta AI non valida. Prova un prompt diverso.", "id": "Respons AI tidak valid. Coba prompt yang berbeda.", "zh-HK": "AI 返回結果無效，請調整輸入內容後重試", "th": "คำตอบของ AI ไม่ถูกต้อง โปรดลองใช้พรอมต์อื่น", "zh-TW": "AI 回傳結果無效，請調整輸入內容後再試一次", "ja": "AI の返答が無効です。入力内容を変更して再試行してください。", "es": "Respuesta de IA no válida. Prueba con un prompt diferente."}, "800004985": {"ru": "Превышена квота ИИ. Пожалуйста, обновите подписку для продолжения.", "fr": "Quota IA dépassé. Veuillez passer à une offre supérieure pour continuer.", "en": "AI quota exceeded. Please upgrade to continue.", "zh": "AI 使用额度已达上限，请提升额度后重试", "ms-MY": "Kuota AI melebihi had. Sila tingkatkan untuk meneruskan.", "pt": "Cota de IA excedida. Atualize para continuar.", "vi": "Đã vượt quá hạn mức AI. Vui lòng nâng cấp để tiếp tục.", "de": "KI-Kontingent überschritten. Bitte aktualisieren, um fortzufahren.", "ko": "AI 할당량을 초과했습니다. 계속하려면 업그레이드하세요.", "it": "Quota AI superata. Effettua l'upgrade per continuare.", "id": "Kuota AI terlampaui. Silakan tingkatkan untuk melanjutkan.", "zh-HK": "AI 使用限額已達上限，請提升限額後重試", "th": "เกินโควต้า AI แล้ว โปรดอัปเกรดเพื่อดำเนินการต่อ", "zh-TW": "AI 使用配額已達上限，請提升配額後再試一次", "ja": "AI 使用上限に達しました。利用枠を増加してから、再試行してください。", "es": "Cuota de IA superada. Actualiza el plan para continuar."}, "5000": {"ru": "Системная ошибка. Попробуйте позже.", "fr": "Erreur système. Veuillez réessayer plus tard.", "en": "System error. Please try again later.", "zh": "系统处理异常，请稍后重试", "ms-MY": "Ralat sistem. Sila cuba lagi nanti.", "pt": "Erro do sistema. Tente novamente mais tarde.", "vi": "Lỗi hệ thống. Vui lòng thử lại sau.", "de": "Systemfehler. Bitte versuchen Sie es später erneut.", "ko": "시스템 오류입니다. 나중에 다시 시도하세요.", "it": "Errore di sistema. Riprova più tardi.", "id": "Kesalahan sistem. Coba lagi nanti.", "zh-HK": "系統處理異常，請稍後重試", "th": "ระบบเกิดข้อผิดพลาด โปรดลองอีกครั้งในภายหลัง", "zh-TW": "系統處理異常，請稍後再試一次", "ja": "システム処理でエラーが発生しました。しばらくしてから再試行してください。", "es": "Error del sistema. Inténtalo de nuevo más tarde."}, "800008501": {"ru": "Истекло время запроса. Повторите попытку позже.", "fr": "La demande a expiré. Veuillez réessayer plus tard.", "en": "Request timed out. Please try again later.", "zh": "请求处理超时，请重试", "ms-MY": "Masa permintaan tamat. Sila cuba lagi kemudian.", "pt": "Tempo limite atingido para solicitação. Tente novamente mais tarde.", "vi": "Đã hết thời gian chờ yêu cầu. Vui lòng thử lại sau.", "de": "Zeitüberschreitung bei Anfrage. Bitte versuchen Sie es später erneut.", "ko": "요청 시간이 초과되었습니다. 나중에 다시 시도하세요.", "it": "Richiesta scaduta. Riprova più tardi.", "id": "Permintaan habis waktu. Coba lagi nanti.", "zh-HK": "要求處理逾時，請重試", "th": "คำขอหมดเวลาแล้ว โปรดลองอีกครั้งในภายหลัง", "zh-TW": "請求處理逾時，請再試一次", "ja": "リクエストの処理がタイムアウトしました。再試行してください。", "es": "Solicitud caducada. Inténtalo de nuevo más tarde."}, "800004983": {"fr": "Le flux de travail n'existe pas. Veuillez confirmer.", "en": "The workflow doesn't exist. Please confirm.", "zh": "当前工作流已不存在，请确认", "ms-MY": "Aliran kerja tidak wujud. Sila sahkan.", "vi": "Quy trình làm việc không tồn tại. Vui lòng xác nhận.", "de": "Der Workflow existiert nicht. Bitte bestätigen Sie.", "it": "Il flusso di lavoro non esiste. Conferma.", "zh-HK": "目前工作流程已不存在，請確認", "ja": "フローが存在しません。ご確認ください。", "es": "El flujo de trabajo no existe. Confírmalo.", "ru": "Рабочий процесс не существует. Проверьте.", "pt": "O fluxo de trabalho não existe. Confirme.", "ko": "워크플로가 존재하지 않습니다. 확인하세요.", "id": "Alur kerja tidak ada. Harap konfirmasi.", "th": "ไม่มีขั้นตอนการทำงานนี้ โปรดยืนยัน"}, "800004965": {"ru": "Время запроса истекло. Попробуйте с меньшим объемом данных.", "fr": "La demande a expiré. Veuillez essayer avec moins de contenu.", "en": "Request timed out. Please try with less content.", "zh": "处理超时，请减少输入内容后重试", "ms-MY": "Permintaan tamat masa. Sila cuba dengan kandungan yang lebih sedikit.", "pt": "Tempo da solicitação esgotado. Por favor, tente com menos conteúdo.", "vi": "Yêu cầu đã hết thời gian chờ. Vui lòng thử với ít nội dung hơn.", "de": "Anfrage abgelaufen. Bitte versuchen Sie es mit weniger Inhalt.", "ko": "요청 시간이 초과되었습니다. 내용을 줄여 다시 시도하세요.", "it": "Tempo di richiesta scaduto. Prova con meno contenuti.", "id": "Permintaan habis waktu. Coba dengan konten lebih sedikit.", "zh-HK": "處理逾時，請減少輸入內容後重試", "th": "คำขอหมดเวลาแล้ว โปรดลองด้วยเนื้อหาที่น้อยลง", "zh-TW": "處理逾時，請減少輸入內容後再試一次", "ja": "処理がタイムアウトしました。入力内容を減らして再試行してください。", "es": "Tiempo de espera agotado. Inténtalo con menos contenido."}, "800004999": {"ru": "Превышен лимит. Уменьшите объем и повторите.", "fr": "Limite dépassée. Veuillez réduire le contenu et réessayer.", "en": "Limit exceeded. Please reduce content and retry.", "zh": "请求处理超过限制，请减少内容后重试", "ms-MY": "Had melebihi. Sila kurangkan kandungan dan cuba lagi.", "pt": "Limite excedido. Reduza o conteúdo e tente novamente.", "vi": "Đã vượt quá giới hạn. Vui lòng giảm nội dung và thử lại.", "de": "Limit überschritten. Bitte reduzieren Sie den Inhalt und versuchen Sie es erneut.", "ko": "제한 초과. 내용을 줄이고 다시 시도하세요.", "it": "Limite superato. Riduci i contenuti e riprova.", "id": "Batas terlampaui. Kurangi konten dan coba lagi.", "zh-HK": "要求處理超過限制，請減少內容後重試", "th": "เกินขีดจำกัดแล้ว โปรดลดเนื้อหาแล้วลองใหม่", "zh-TW": "請求處理超過限制，請減少內容後再試一次", "ja": "制限を超えました。内容を減らして再試行してください。", "es": "Límite superado. Reduce el contenido e inténtalo de nuevo."}, "800005001": {"ru": "Ошибка чтения данных. Попробуйте позже.", "fr": "Échec de lecture des données. Veuillez réessayer plus tard.", "en": "Invalid parameter. Please try again later.", "zh": "输入参数无效，请检查后重试", "ms-MY": "Parameter tidak sah. Sila cuba lagi nanti.", "pt": "Parâmetro inválido. Please check your previous step and retry.", "zh": "前置步骤数据获取失败，请检查相关步骤后重试", "ms-MY": "Gagal mendapatkan data daripada langkah sebelumnya. Sila semak langkah sebelumnya dan cuba lagi.", "pt": "Falha ao buscar dados da etapa anterior. Verifique sua etapa anterior e tente novamente.", "vi": "Không lấy được dữ liệu từ bước trước. Vui lòng kiểm tra bước trước và thử lại.", "de": "Daten konnten im vorherigen Schritt nicht abgerufen werden. Periksa langkah sebelumnya dan coba lagi.", "zh-HK": "前置步驟數據獲取失敗，請檢查相關步驟後重試", "th": "ไม่สามารถดึงข้อมูลจากขั้นตอนก่อนหน้าได้ โปรดตรวจสอบขั้นตอนก่อนหน้าแล้วลองใหม่", "zh-TW": "前置步驟資料取得失敗，請檢查相關步驟後再試一次", "ja": "前のステップのデータ取得に失敗しました。関連ステップを確認して再試行してください。", "es": "No se han podido obtener datos del paso anterior. "https://waytoagi.feishu.cn/wiki/QPe5w5g7UisbEkkow8XcDmOpn8e?from=h5_rec", "type": 16, "id": 1, "desc": "🌈 通往 AGI 之路-WaytoAGI ：是由一群热爱AI的专家和爱好者共同建设的开源 AI 知识库，大家贡献并整合各种 AI 资源，使得大家都可以轻松学习各种AI知识，应用各类 AI 工具和实战案例等"}, {"title": "玩转ChatGPT", "image": "https://sf3-scmcdn2-cn.feishucdn.com/ccm/static_resource/scm_upload/ccm_platform_bottom_recommend_article_v2.png", "token": "wikcnJyI9wsyjyBc8xiDgv0cY8b", "link": "https://k5ms77k0o1.feishu.cn/wiki/wikcnJyI9wsyjyBc8xiDgv0cY8b?from=h5_rec", "type": 16, "id": 2, "desc": "👋 Hi！我是Ryan🦄.eth。致未来的探索者们：我们坚信，拥抱人工智能(AI)的力量，是每个人未来发展的必经之路。在这条充满探索的旅途上，我们不应该孤军奋战，而应该抱团取暖。于是，我将我学习AI的笔记开源成我的知识库，每一篇笔记都是我自己走过的学习路线，我将他们全部公开出来，并且附上一些任务Quiz用来检测自己的完成情况，希望让每个人都能少走弯路，让学习AI不再困难。让我们一起踏上这场学习之旅，探索AI的无限可能。"}, {"title": "AI产品榜", "image": "https://sf3-scmcdn2-cn.feishucdn.com/ccm/static_resource/scm_upload/ccm_platform_bottom_recommend_article_v3.png", "token": "YTIUwM6Vmij4IQkSm9PctPWunIb", "link": "https://dnipkggqxh.feishu.cn/wiki/YTIUwM6Vmij4IQkSm9PctPWunIb?from=h5_rec", "type": 16, "id": 3, "desc": "AI产品榜由李榜主发起，联合 30+ 位 AI 领域公众号主理人发布的 AI产品榜。 也是被 中国新闻周刊、中国基金报、腾讯科技、雪球 等权威媒体，引用最多的AI产品榜单。欢迎一起来联名发布AI产品榜，为中国AI发展贡献一点微薄的力量。"}, {"title": "LangGPT |  Ai 结构化提示词", "image": "https://sf3-scmcdn2-cn.feishucdn.com/ccm/static_resource/scm_upload/ccm_platform_bottom_recommend_article_v4.png", "token": "RXdbwRyASiShtDky381ciwFEnpe", "link": "https://langgptai.feishu.cn/wiki/RXdbwRyASiShtDky381ciwFEnpe?from=h5_rec", "type": 16, "id": 4, "desc": "Ai 结构化提示词知识库汇聚了国内最新最全的 Ai 提示词知识，内容来自国内最大的 Ai 提示词开源社区 LangGPT，助你轻松打造超强个人 Ai 助手。结构化提示词框架由云中江树于2023年创造，最早于 2023 年 5.4 青年节开源发布为 LangGPT 项目，一经发布便成为  GitHub 开源社区全球趋势热榜前十项目，并且撰写了学术论文开源发表。LangGPT 提出的结构化提示词已被百度、智谱、字节、华为等国内主流大模型智能体平台使用，并且成为 kimi 官方提示词。"}, {"title": "OSLAW WiKi .preview-sdk__box-preview-container .ud__msg-manager{position:absolute;z-index:1201}body .preview-sdk__box-preview-container .viewer-container .viewer-toolbar,body .preview-sdk__box-preview-container .viewer-container .viewer-toolbar.black{background:var(--bg-float);border:1px solid var(--line-border-card);border-radius:6px}body .preview-sdk__box-preview-container .viewer-container .viewer-toolbar .tooltiptext{background:var(--bg-tips)!important;color:var(--static-white)!important;border-radius:8px!important}body .preview-sdk__box-preview-container .viewer-container .viewer-toolbar .tooltiptext:after{border-left-color:transparent!important;border-bottom-color:transparent!important;border-right-color:var(--bg-tips)!important;border-top-color:var(--bg-tips)!important;border-radius:2px!important}</style><style type="text/css">button.disable-hover-style:hover {
  color: var(--text-title) !important;
}
.float-menu-btn {
  background-color: var(--bg-float);
}
.float-menu-btn:hover {
  background-color: var(--udtoken-btn-se-bg-neutral-hover) !important;
}
html[data-theme='dark'] .float-menu-btn:hover {
  background-color: var(--bg-body) !important;
}
</style><style type="text/css">.rich-text-preview {
  width: 100%;
  max-height: 384px;
  overflow-y: auto;
}
.ai-rich-text-full-screen-dialog .ud__modal__body {
  padding: 0;
  margin: 0;
  overflow: hidden;
}
.ai-rich-text-full-screen-dialog .ud__modal__body .ai-full-screen-dialog-close-button {
  position: fixed;
  top: 10px;
  right: 16px;
  border: none;
  background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5);
  box-shadow: 0 1px 3px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08);
  width: 48px;
  height: 48px;
}
.ai-rich-text-full-screen-dialog .ud__modal__body .ai-full-screen-dialog-close-button:hover {
  background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.25);
}
.ai-rich-text-full-screen-dialog .ud__modal__body .ai-full-screen-dialog-close-button svg {
  color: white;
}
.ai-rich-text-full-screen-dialog-wrapper.ud__dialog__wrap {
  overflow: hidden;
}
</style><style type="text/css">.copilot-comp__mask {
  position: fixed;
  top: 0;
  bottom: 0;
  left: 0;
  right: 0;
  z-index: 100;
}
.copilot-comp__container-wrapper {
  position: absolute;
  transition: transform 0.1s ease-in-out;
  z-index: 101;
  margin-bottom: 20px;
  background-color: transparent;
  border-radius: 10px;
  /**
    只在【waiting】状态时生效、writing和finish状态不变
    上下等宽时，去掉【input div】、【指令 div】的border 和 box-shadow
    - (copilot-comp__container)
    - (copilot-comp__prompt-wrapper)
    在它们的【上一级div】加 border、border-radius 和 box-shadow
    -（copilot-comp__copilot-panel-normal)
  */
}
@property --copilot-comp-conic-deg {
  syntax: '<angle>';
  initial-value: 132deg;
  inherits: false;
}
.copilot-comp__container-wrapper .copilot-comp__container {
  box-shadow: var(--shadow-s5-down);
}
.copilot-comp__container-wrapper .roadster-mention-popover .larkw-mention-panel__tabs {
  display: none;
}
.copilot-comp__container-wrapper .roadster-mention-popover .gpf-biz-mention__mention-panel {
  max-height: 336px !important;
}
.copilot-comp__container-wrapper .roadster-mention-popover > div {
  top: 0 !important;
}
.copilot-comp__container-wrapper * {
  box-sizing: border-box;
}
.copilot-comp__container-wrapper-float {
  transition: none;
  cursor: move;
}
.copilot-comp__container-wrapper-float .copilot-comp__input-wrapper,
.copilot-comp__container-wrapper-float .copilot-comp__ai-menu {
  cursor: auto;
}
.copilot-comp__container-wrapper-modal {
  max-height: 866px;
  min-width: 300px;
  position: absolute;
  width: 640px;
  height: auto;
}
.copilot-comp__container-wrapper-float-focus-out .copilot-comp__prompt-menu-container .copilot-comp__ai-menu .ud__menu-normal-item:hover,
.copilot-comp__container-wrapper-float-focus-out .copilot-comp__prompt-menu-container .copilot-comp__ai-menu .ud__menu-normal-submenu:hover,
.copilot-comp__container-wrapper-float-focus-out .copilot-comp__prompt-menu-container .copilot-comp__ai-menu .ud__menu-normal-submenu-open {
  border-radius: 6px;
  background: var(--fill-hover);
}
.copilot-comp__container-wrapper-float-focus-out .copilot-comp__container .ud__menu-normal-submenu .copilot-comp__menu-item-normal:hover {
  background: var(--fill-hover);
}
.copilot-comp__container-wrapper:hover .copilot-comp__float-bar {
  display: flex;
}
.copilot-comp__container-wrapper.copilot-comp__status-custom {
  box-shadow: var(--shadow-s5-down);
  background-color: var(--bg-float);
  border: 1px solid var(--line-border-card);
}
.copilot-comp__container-wrapper.copilot-comp__status-writing .copilot-comp__border {
  border: 0;
  padding: 2px;
}
.copilot-comp__container-wrapper.copilot-comp__status-writing .copilot-comp__border::before {
  content: '';
  position: absolute;
  border-radius: 10px;
  background-image: conic-gradient(from var(--copilot-comp-conic-deg) at 50% 50%, #4752e6 -26.25deg, #4752e6 106.88deg, #cf5ecf 225deg, #4752e6 333.75deg, #4752e6 466.88deg);
  z-index: 0;
  top: 0;
  left: 0;
  right: 0;
  bottom: 0;
  animation: copilot-comp-spin 3s linear infinite;
}
@keyframes copilot-comp-spin {
  0% {
    --copilot-comp-conic-deg: 0deg;
  }
  100% {
    --copilot-comp-conic-deg: 360deg;
  }
}
.copilot-comp__container-wrapper.copilot-comp__status-writing .copilot-comp__border .copilot-comp__container {
  border-radius: 8px;
  border: none;
}
.copilot-comp__container-wrapper.copilot-comp__status-waiting .copilot-comp__border {
  border: none;
}
.copilot-comp__container-wrapper.copilot-comp__status-waiting .copilot-comp__border .copilot-comp__container {
  padding: 0;
}
.copilot-comp__container-wrapper.copilot-comp__status-waiting .copilot-comp__container .copilot-comp__copilot-panel {
  height: 100%;
}
.copilot-comp__container-wrapper.copilot-comp__status-waiting .copilot-comp__input-wrapper {
  padding: 8px;
  background-color: var(--bg-float);
}
.copilot-comp__container-wrapper.copilot-comp__status-waiting .copilot-comp__input-wrapper .copilot-comp__input-data-area {
  padding: 0 12px;
  background-color: var(--bg-float-overlay);
  border-radius: 6px 6px 0 0;
}
.copilot-comp__container-wrapper.copilot-comp__status-waiting .copilot-comp__input-wrapper .copilot-comp__input {
  padding: 12px;
  background-color: var(--bg-float-overlay);
  border-radius: 6px;
  color: rgba(76, 133, 255, 0.34);
  color: rgba(51, 112, 255, 0.34);
}
.copilot-comp__container-wrapper.copilot-comp__status-waiting .copilot-comp__input-wrapper .copilot-comp__input-has-data {
  border-radius: 0 0 6px 6px;
}
.copilot-comp__container-wrapper.copilot-comp__status-finished .copilot-comp__menu-container {
  max-height: 168px;
}
.copilot-comp__container-wrapper.copilot-comp__status-finished .copilot-comp__copilot-panel-reverse .copilot-comp__input-wrapper {
  margin-top: 8px;
}
.copilot-comp__container-wrapper.copilot-comp__status-finished .copilot-comp__prompt-close-area {
  display: none;
}
.copilot-comp__container-wrapper.copilot-comp__status-waiting.copilot-comp__container-wrapper-modal {
  background: none;
  background-color: transparent;
  box-shadow: none;
}
.copilot-comp__container-wrapper.copilot-comp__status-waiting.copilot-comp__container-wrapper-modal .copilot-comp__container {
  padding: 0 !important;
  background: none;
  background-color: transparent !important;
}
.copilot-comp__container-wrapper.copilot-comp__status-waiting.copilot-comp__container-wrapper-modal .copilot-comp__container .copilot-comp__copilot-panel {
  background: none;
  background-color: transparent;
  height: 100%;
}
.copilot-comp__container-wrapper.copilot-comp__status-waiting.copilot-comp__container-wrapper-float {
  border-radius: 8px;
}
.copilot-comp__container-wrapper.copilot-comp__status-waiting.copilot-comp__container-wrapper-float .copilot-comp__border {
  border-radius: 8px;
}
.copilot-comp__container-wrapper.copilot-comp__status-waiting.copilot-comp__container-wrapper-float .copilot-comp__input-wrapper {
  cursor: unset;
}
.copilot-comp__container-wrapper.copilot-comp__status-waiting.copilot-comp__container-wrapper-float .copilot-comp__input-wrapper .copilot-comp__input-data-area,
.copilot-comp__container-wrapper.copilot-comp__status-waiting.copilot-comp__container-wrapper-float .copilot-comp__input-wrapper .copilot-comp__input {
  cursor: auto;
}
.copilot-comp__container-wrapper.copilot-comp__status-waiting.copilot-comp__container-wrapper-float .copilot-comp__prompt-wrapper {
  width: 100%;
  background-color: transparent;
}
.copilot-comp__container-wrapper.copilot-comp__status-waiting .copilot-comp__copilot-panel-normal {
  border-radius: 10px;
  border: 1px solid var(--line-border-card) !important;
  box-shadow: var(--shadow-s5-down);
  background-color: var(--bg-float);
}
.copilot-comp__container-wrapper.copilot-comp__status-waiting .copilot-comp__copilot-panel-normal .copilot-comp__container {
  border: none !important;
  box-shadow: none;
}
.copilot-comp__container-wrapper.copilot-comp__status-waiting .copilot-comp__copilot-panel-normal .copilot-comp__prompt-menu-container {
  margin-top: 0;
  border: none;
  box-shadow: none;
}
.copilot-comp__container-wrapper .copilot-comp__float-bar {
  width: 18px;
  height: 18px;
  display: none;
  position: absolute;
  z-index: 100;
  top: -10px;
  right: -8px;
  background-color: var(--bg-float);
  border-radius: 50%;
}
.copilot-comp__container-wrapper .copilot-comp__float-bar-always {
  display: flex;
}
.copilot-comp__container-wrapper .copilot-comp__float-bar .ud__button {
  width: 18px;
  height: 18px;
  font-size: 10px;
  box-shadow: var(--shadow-s3-down);
}
.copilot-comp__container-wrapper .copilot-comp__copilot-panel-reverse .copilot-comp__prompt-wrapper {
  padding-bottom: 6px;
}
.copilot-comp__container-wrapper .copilot-comp__copilot-panel-reverse .copilot-comp__prompt-menu-container {
  margin-bottom: 0 !important;
}
.copilot-comp__container-wrapper .copilot-comp__border {
  border-radius: 10px;
  height: 100%;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
}
.copilot-comp__container-wrapper .copilot-comp__border .copilot-comp__cancel-drag {
  cursor: auto;
}
.copilot-comp__container-wrapper .copilot-comp__border .copilot-comp__container {
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  border-radius: 10px;
  padding: 12px;
  background-color: var(--bg-float);
  display: flex;
  position: relative;
  flex-direction: column;
  border: 1px solid var(--line-border-card);
  justify-content: space-between;
}
.copilot-comp__container-wrapper .copilot-comp__border .copilot-comp__container .copilot-comp__info-panel {
  display: flex;
  margin-bottom: 10px;
  justify-content: space-between;
}
.copilot-comp__container-wrapper .copilot-comp__border .copilot-comp__container .copilot-comp__info-panel-reverse-line {
  display: block;
}
.copilot-comp__container-wrapper .copilot-comp__border .copilot-comp__container .copilot-comp__info-panel-reverse-line .copilot-comp__copilot-know-more {
  margin-right: 0 !important;
}
.copilot-comp__container-wrapper .copilot-comp__border .copilot-comp__container .copilot-comp__info-panel-reverse-line .copilot-comp__history-divider {
  display: none;
}
.copilot-comp__container-wrapper .copilot-comp__border .copilot-comp__container .copilot-comp__info-panel .copilot-comp__copilot-know-more {
  cursor: auto;
  display: flex;
  align-items: flex-start;
  background-color: transparent;
  color: var(--icon-n3);
  font-size: 14px;
  line-height: 22px;
  margin-right: 20px;
}
.copilot-comp__container-wrapper .copilot-comp__border .copilot-comp__container .copilot-comp__info-panel .copilot-comp__copilot-know-more .copilot-comp__icon {
  color: var(--icon-n3);
  margin-top: 3px;
  margin-right: 4px;
}
.copilot-comp__container-wrapper .copilot-comp__border .copilot-comp__container .copilot-comp__info-panel .copilot-comp__copilot-know-more .copilot-comp__icon svg {
  width: 16px;
  height: 16px;
}
.copilot-comp__container-wrapper .copilot-comp__border .copilot-comp__container .copilot-comp__info-panel .copilot-comp__extra-button-group {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: space-between;
  height: 22px;
  margin-left: auto;
}
.copilot-comp__container-wrapper .copilot-comp__border .copilot-comp__container .copilot-comp__info-panel .copilot-comp__extra-button-group .copilot-comp__feedback-container {
  cursor: auto;
  display: flex;
  gap: 8px;
}
.copilot-comp__container-wrapper .copilot-comp__border .copilot-comp__container .copilot-comp__info-panel .copilot-comp__extra-button-group .copilot-comp__feedback-container .ud__button--icon {
  color: var(--icon-n3);
  padding: 2px;
}
.copilot-comp__container-wrapper .copilot-comp__border .copilot-comp__container .copilot-comp__info-panel .copilot-comp__extra-button-group .copilot-comp__feedback-container .ud__button--icon svg {
  width: 16px;
  height: 16px;
}
.copilot-comp__container-wrapper .copilot-comp__border .copilot-comp__container .copilot-comp__info-panel .copilot-comp__extra-button-group .copilot-comp__feedback-container-like.ud__button--icon-primary {
  color: #ffc60a;
}
.copilot-comp__container-wrapper .copilot-comp__border .copilot-comp__container .copilot-comp__info-panel .copilot-comp__extra-button-group .copilot-comp__feedback-container-like.ud__button--icon-primary .universe-icon {
  color: #ffc60a;
}
.copilot-comp__container-wrapper .copilot-comp__border .copilot-comp__container .copilot-comp__info-panel .copilot-comp__extra-button-group .copilot-comp__feedback-container-unlike.ud__button--icon-primary {
  color: var(--icon-n2);
}
.copilot-comp__container-wrapper .copilot-comp__border .copilot-comp__container .copilot-comp__info-panel .copilot-comp__extra-button-group .copilot-comp__feedback-container .ud__button--icon-primary:hover {
  background-color: var(--fill-hover);
}
.copilot-comp__container-wrapper .copilot-comp__border .copilot-comp__container .copilot-comp__info-panel .copilot-comp__extra-button-group .copilot-comp__feedback-container .ud__button--icon-primary:focus-visible {
  background-color: var(--fill-hover);
}
.copilot-comp__container-wrapper .copilot-comp__border .copilot-comp__container .copilot-comp__info-panel .copilot-comp__extra-button-group .copilot-comp__feedback-container .ud__button--icon-primary:active {
  background-color: var(--fill-pressed);
}
.copilot-comp__container-wrapper .copilot-comp__border .copilot-comp__container .copilot-comp__button-panel {
  padding: 0 0 12px;
}
.copilot-comp__container-wrapper .copilot-comp__border .copilot-comp__container .copilot-comp__button-panel.copilot-comp__hidden-input {
  padding-bottom: 0;
}
.copilot-comp__container-wrapper .copilot-comp__border .copilot-comp__container .copilot-comp__button-panel .copilot-comp__button-container {
  display: flex;
  justify-content: space-between;
  align-items: center;
  background-color: var(--bg-float);
}
.copilot-comp__container-wrapper .copilot-comp__border .copilot-comp__container .copilot-comp__button-panel .copilot-comp__button-container .copilot-comp__operater-button-group {
  display: flex;
  justify-content: flex-start;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 8px;
}
.copilot-comp__container-wrapper .copilot-comp__border .copilot-comp__container .copilot-comp__button-panel .copilot-comp__button-container .copilot-comp__operater-button-group .ud__button {
  cursor: pointer;
  min-width: unset;
  padding: 5px 12px;
}
.copilot-comp__container-wrapper .copilot-comp__border .copilot-comp__container .copilot-comp__button-panel .copilot-comp__button-container .copilot-comp__operater-button-group .ud__button .ud__button__loading-icon {
  color: var(--icon-disabled);
}
.copilot-comp__container-wrapper .copilot-comp__border .copilot-comp__container .copilot-comp__preview-editor-container {
  flex: 1;
  width: 100%;
  overflow: auto;
  margin-bottom: 12px;
  background-color: transparent;
  cursor: default;
}
.copilot-comp__container-wrapper .copilot-comp__border .copilot-comp__container .copilot-comp__preview-editor-container::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb {
  border-radius: 9999px;
  transition: background 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.34, 0.69, 0.1, 1);
  background-color: rgba(31, 35, 41, 0.3);
  border: 2px solid transparent;
  background-clip: padding-box;
}
.copilot-comp__container-wrapper .copilot-comp__border .copilot-comp__container .copilot-comp__preview-editor-container::-webkit-scrollbar {
  width: 11px;
  height: 11px;
  background-color: transparent;
}
.copilot-comp__container-wrapper .copilot-comp__border .copilot-comp__container .copilot-comp__preview-editor-container::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb:hover {
  background-color: rgba(31, 35, 41, 0.6) !important;
}
.copilot-comp__container-wrapper .copilot-comp__border .copilot-comp__container .copilot-comp__preview-editor-container::-webkit-scrollbar:hover {
  width: 11px;
  height: 11px;
}
.copilot-comp__container-wrapper .copilot-comp__border .copilot-comp__container .copilot-comp__preview-editor-container::-webkit-scrollbar-button {
  display: none;
}
.copilot-comp__container-wrapper .copilot-comp__border .copilot-comp__container .copilot-comp__preview-editor-container::-webkit-scrollbar-track {
  background-color: transparent;
}
.copilot-comp__container-wrapper .copilot-comp__border .copilot-comp__container .copilot-comp__preview-editor-container::-webkit-scrollbar-corner {
  background-color: transparent;
}
.copilot-comp__container-wrapper .copilot-comp__border .copilot-comp__container .copilot-comp__preview-editor-container .copilot-comp__preview-editor {
  position: relative;
  cursor: auto;
  overflow: hidden;
}
.copilot-comp__container-wrapper .copilot-comp__border .copilot-comp__container .copilot-comp__preview-editor-container .page-block-header {
  display: none;
}
.copilot-comp__container-wrapper .copilot-comp__border .copilot-comp__container .copilot-comp__copilot-panel {
  border-radius: 10px;
  background-color: var(--bg-float);
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
}
.copilot-comp__container-wrapper .copilot-comp__border .copilot-comp__container .copilot-comp__history-pager {
  padding: 0 4px;
}
.copilot-comp__container-wrapper .copilot-comp__border .copilot-comp__container .copilot-comp__history {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  user-select: none;
  font-size: 14px;
  color: var(--icon-n2);
}
.copilot-comp__container-wrapper .copilot-comp__border .copilot-comp__container .copilot-comp__history-divider {
  height: 19px;
  width: 1px;
  margin: 0 12px;
  background-color: var(--line-border-component);
}
.copilot-comp__container-wrapper .copilot-comp__border.copilot-comp__copilot-panel-reverse {
  flex-direction: column-reverse;
}
.copilot-comp__container-wrapper .copilot-comp__border.copilot-comp__copilot-panel-reverse .copilot-comp__prompt-menu-container {
  margin-top: 0;
  margin-bottom: 8px;
}
</style><style type="text/css">.copilot-comp__prompt-wrapper {
  display: flex;
  position: relative;
  cursor: initial;
}
.copilot-comp__prompt-wrapper .decorative-mask-wrapper .mask-bottom {
  width: calc(100% - 2px);
  height: 32px;
  left: 1px;
  bottom: 1px;
  border-radius: 8px;
}
.copilot-comp__prompt-menu-container {
  min-width: 302px;
  max-height: 325px;
  background-color: var(--bg-float);
  margin-top: 4px;
  border: 1px solid var(--line-border-card);
  border-radius: 8px;
  user-select: none;
  padding: 4px;
  box-shadow: var(--shadow-s5-down);
}
.copilot-comp__prompt-menu-container .ud__menu-normal-item-group-title {
  padding: 4px 8px;
}
.copilot-comp__prompt-menu-container .copilot-comp__empty-group-title .ud__menu-normal-item-group-title {
  padding: 0;
}
.copilot-comp__prompt-menu-container .ud__menu-normal-item,
.copilot-comp__prompt-menu-container .ud__menu-normal-submenu-title {
  margin: 0;
  overflow: hidden;
}
.copilot-comp__prompt-menu-container ul::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb {
  border-radius: 9999px;
  transition: background 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.34, 0.69, 0.1, 1);
  background-color: rgba(31, 35, 41, 0.3);
  border: 2px solid transparent;
  background-clip: padding-box;
}
.copilot-comp__prompt-menu-container ul::-webkit-scrollbar {
  width: 11px;
  height: 11px;
  background-color: transparent;
}
.copilot-comp__prompt-menu-container ul::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb:hover {
  background-color: rgba(31, 35, 41, 0.6) !important;
}
.copilot-comp__prompt-menu-container ul::-webkit-scrollbar:hover {
  width: 11px;
  height: 11px;
}
.copilot-comp__prompt-menu-container ul::-webkit-scrollbar-button {
  display: none;
}
.copilot-comp__prompt-menu-container ul::-webkit-scrollbar-track {
  background-color: transparent;
}
.copilot-comp__prompt-menu-container ul::-webkit-scrollbar-corner {
  background-color: transparent;
}
.copilot-comp__prompt-menu-container .ud-typography-headline {
  font-weight: 400;
}
.copilot-comp__prompt-menu-container .copilot-comp__ai-menu {
  background-color: var(--bg-float);
}
.copilot-comp__prompt-menu-container .ud__menu-normal-submenu-title {
  padding-left: 12px;
}
.copilot-comp__prompt-menu-container .ud__menu-normal-submenu-title .ud__menu-normal-item-title-content {
  width: calc(100% - 20px);
  white-space: nowrap;
  text-overflow: ellipsis;
  overflow: hidden;
}
.copilot-comp__prompt-menu-container .copilot-comp__menu-item-normal {
  align-items: center;
  padding: 5px 6px 5px 12px;
}
.copilot-comp__prompt-menu-container .copilot-comp__menu-item-normal .ud__menu-normal-icon-wrap {
  font-size: 18px;
}
.copilot-comp__prompt-menu-container .copilot-comp__menu-item-normal .ud__menu-normal-item-title-content {
  flex: 1;
  width: 0;
  position: relative;
  display: flex;
}
.copilot-comp__prompt-menu-container .copilot-comp__menu-item-normal .ud__menu-normal-item-title-content > span:first-child {
  width: 100%;
  display: block;
  white-space: nowrap;
  text-overflow: ellipsis;
  overflow: hidden;
}
.copilot-comp__prompt-menu-container .copilot-comp__menu-item-normal.ud__menu-normal-item:hover .ud__menu-normal-item-title-content > span:first-child {
  max-width: 100%;
}
.copilot-comp__prompt-menu-container .copilot-comp__menu-item-normal.ud__menu-normal-item-selected .ud__menu-normal-item-title-content > span:first-child {
  padding-right: 28px;
}
.copilot-comp__prompt-menu-container .copilot-comp__menu-item-normal.ud__menu-normal-item-selected .copilot-comp__menu-item-extras {
  display: flex;
}
.copilot-comp__prompt-menu-container .copilot-comp__menu-item-normal .copilot-comp__menu-item-extras {
  display: none;
  margin-left: auto;
  position: absolute;
  right: 0;
  top: 0;
}
.copilot-comp__prompt-menu-container .copilot-comp__menu-item-normal .copilot-comp__menu-item-extras .copilot-comp__menu-item-extra-node {
  color: var(--icon-n3);
  width: 22px;
  height: 22px;
  margin-left: 6px;
  border-radius: 4px;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
}
.copilot-comp__prompt-menu-container .copilot-comp__menu-item-normal .copilot-comp__menu-item-extras .copilot-comp__menu-item-extra-node.clickable:hover {
  background-color: var(--fill-hover);
}
.copilot-comp__prompt-menu-container .copilot-comp__menu-item-normal .copilot-comp__target-text {
  color: var(--text-link-hover);
}
.copilot-comp__prompt-menu-container .copilot-comp__menu-item-normal .copilot-comp__desc {
  color: var(--icon-n2);
}
.copilot-comp__prompt-menu-container .copilot-comp__ai-menu {
  border: 0;
  box-shadow: none;
  padding: 0;
}
.copilot-comp__prompt-menu-container .copilot-comp__ai-menu .ud__menu-normal-icon-wrap {
  color: var(--icon-n2);
  margin-right: 12px;
}
.copilot-comp__prompt-menu-container .copilot-comp__ai-menu .ud__menu-normal-item-active,
.copilot-comp__prompt-menu-container .copilot-comp__ai-menu .ud__menu-normal-item:focus-visible {
  background-color: transparent;
}
.copilot-comp__prompt-menu-container .copilot-comp__ai-menu .ud__menu-normal-item-selected,
.copilot-comp__prompt-menu-container .copilot-comp__ai-menu .ud__menu-normal-submenu-selected .ud__menu-normal-submenu-title {
  background: var(--fill-hover) !important;
  border-radius: 6px;
  color: var(--text-title);
}
.copilot-comp__prompt-menu-container .copilot-comp__ai-menu .ud__menu-normal-item-selected .ud__menu-normal-item-suffix-icon svg[data-icon='ListCheckBoldOutlined'],
.copilot-comp__prompt-menu-container .copilot-comp__ai-menu .ud__menu-normal-submenu-selected .ud__menu-normal-submenu-title .ud__menu-normal-item-suffix-icon svg[data-icon='ListCheckBoldOutlined'] {
  display: none;
}
.copilot-comp__prompt-menu-container .copilot-comp__ai-menu .ud__menu-normal-item:hover,
.copilot-comp__prompt-menu-container .copilot-comp__ai-menu .ud__menu-normal-submenu-title {
  background: unset;
}
.copilot-comp__prompt-close-area {
  flex: 1;
  cursor: default;
}
.copilot-comp__ai-button-popover .ud__popover-content {
  padding: 3px 0;
}
.copilot-comp__ai-button-popover .copilot-comp__ai-menu .ud__menu-normal-submenu-active .ud__menu-normal-submenu-title,
.copilot-comp__ai-button-popover .copilot-comp__ai-menu .ud__menu-normal-item:hover {
  border-radius: 6px;
  color: var(--text-title);
  background: var(--fill-hover) !important;
}
.copilot-comp__ai-button-popover .ud__popover__overlay-content .ud__menu-normal {
  max-height: 456px;
  border: 0;
}
.ud__menu-normal-submenu.copilot-comp__ai-menu {
  max-height: 456px;
  background-color: var(--bg-float);
}
.ud__menu-normal-submenu.copilot-comp__ai-menu .ud__menu-normal-item-title-content {
  flex: 1;
  position: relative;
  display: flex;
  width: 100%;
}
.ud__menu-normal-submenu.copilot-comp__ai-menu .ud__menu-normal-item-title-content > span:first-child {
  display: block;
  white-space: nowrap;
  text-overflow: ellipsis;
  overflow: hidden;
}
.ud__menu-normal-submenu.copilot-comp__ai-menu .ud__menu-normal-item:hover {
  background: unset;
}
.ud__menu-normal-submenu.copilot-comp__ai-menu .ud__menu-normal-item-selected {
  color: var(--text-title);
  background: var(--fill-hover) !important;
}
.ud__menu-normal-submenu.copilot-comp__ai-menu .ud__menu-normal-item-selected .copilot-comp__menu-item-extras {
  display: flex;
}
.ud__menu-normal-submenu.copilot-comp__ai-menu .copilot-comp__menu-item-extras {
  display: none;
  margin-left: auto;
}
.ud__menu-normal-submenu.copilot-comp__ai-menu .copilot-comp__menu-item-extras .copilot-comp__menu-item-extra-node {
  color: var(--icon-n3);
  width: 22px;
  height: 22px;
  margin-left: 6px;
  border-radius: 4px;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
}
.ud__menu-normal-submenu.copilot-comp__ai-menu .copilot-comp__menu-item-extras .copilot-comp__menu-item-extra-node.clickable:hover {
  background-color: var(--fill-hover);
}
.ud__menu-normal-submenu.copilot-comp__ai-menu.copilot-comp__entry--menu {
  min-width: 200px;
  max-width: 400px;
}
.ud__menu-normal-submenu.copilot-comp__ai-menu.copilot-comp__entry--button .ud__menu-normal-item:hover {
  background: var(--fill-hover) !important;
}
.ud__menu-normal-submenu.copilot-comp__ai-menu ul::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb {
  border-radius: 9999px;
  transition: background 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.34, 0.69, 0.1, 1);
  background-color: rgba(31, 35, 41, 0.3);
  border: 2px solid transparent;
  background-clip: padding-box;
}
.ud__menu-normal-submenu.copilot-comp__ai-menu ul::-webkit-scrollbar {
  width: 11px;
  height: 11px;
  background-color: transparent;
}
.ud__menu-normal-submenu.copilot-comp__ai-menu ul::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb:hover {
  background-color: rgba(31, 35, 41, 0.6) !important;
}
.ud__menu-normal-submenu.copilot-comp__ai-menu ul::-webkit-scrollbar:hover {
  width: 11px;
  height: 11px;
}
.ud__menu-normal-submenu.copilot-comp__ai-menu ul::-webkit-scrollbar-button {
  display: none;
}
.ud__menu-normal-submenu.copilot-comp__ai-menu ul::-webkit-scrollbar-track {
  background-color: transparent;
}
.ud__menu-normal-submenu.copilot-comp__ai-menu ul::-webkit-scrollbar-corner {
  background-color: transparent;
}
</style><style type="text/css">.ud__button.copilot-comp__ai-button-primary {
  border: 1px solid transparent;
  border-radius: 6px;
  background-clip: padding-box, border-box;
  background-origin: padding-box, border-box;
  background-image: linear-gradient(var(--bg-float), var(--bg-float)), var(--AI-primary-fill-default);
}
.ud__button.copilot-comp__ai-button-primary .copilot-comp__ai-button-text {
  background: var(--AI-primary-content-default);
  -webkit-background-clip: text;
  background-clip: text;
  color: transparent;
}
.ud__button.copilot-comp__ai-button-primary:hover {
  border: 1px solid transparent;
  border-radius: 6px;
  background-clip: padding-box, border-box;
  background-origin: padding-box, border-box;
  background-image: var(--AI-primary-fill-solid-01), var(--AI-primary-fill-default);
}
.ud__button.copilot-comp__ai-button-primary:active {
  border: 1px solid transparent;
  border-radius: 6px;
  background-clip: padding-box, border-box;
  background-origin: padding-box, border-box;
  background-image: var(--AI-primary-fill-solid-02), var(--AI-primary-fill-default);
}
.ud__button.copilot-comp__ai-button-normal[aria-expanded='true'] {
  background: var(--fill-hover);
}
.ud__button.copilot-comp__ai-button-normal .copilot-comp__ai-button-expand-icon {
  color: var(--icon-n3);
  margin-left: 2px;
  font-size: 12px;
}
</style><style type="text/css">.decorative-mask-wrapper {
  position: relative;
}
.decorative-mask-wrapper .mask {
  position: absolute;
  width: 100%;
  height: 20px;
  left: 0;
  z-index: 1;
  transition: all 0.5s;
  pointer-events: none;
}
.decorative-mask-wrapper .mask.show {
  opacity: 1;
}
.decorative-mask-wrapper .mask.hide {
  opacity: 0;
}
.decorative-mask-wrapper .mask-top {
  top: 0;
  background: linear-gradient(180deg, #fff, #fff0);
}
.decorative-mask-wrapper .mask-bottom {
  bottom: 0;
  background: linear-gradient(180deg, #fff0, #fff);
}
html[data-theme='dark'] .decorative-mask-wrapper .mask.mask-top {
  background: linear-gradient(180deg, #292929, #29292900);
}
html[data-theme='dark'] .decorative-mask-wrapper .mask.mask-bottom {
  background: linear-gradient(180deg, #29292900, #292929);
}
</style><style media="screen">.gpf-biz-mention__loading-wrapper {
  width: 360px;
  height: 100%;
  display: flex;
  justify-content: center;
  align-items: center;
  min-height: 168px;
  background-color: var(--bg-body);
  box-shadow: 0 6px 24px var(--shadow-default-lg);
  border-radius: 6px;
}
</style><style type="text/css">.copilot-comp__input-wrapper {
  padding: 0 12px;
  border-radius: 10px;
  background-color: var(--bg-float-overlay);
}
.copilot-comp__input-wrapper .copilot-comp__input {
  min-height: 48px;
  padding: 12px 0;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  position: relative;
}
.copilot-comp__input-wrapper .copilot-comp__input .copilot-comp__textarea {
  caret-color: var(--AI-cursor);
}
.copilot-comp__input-wrapper .copilot-comp__input-data-area {
  height: 30px;
  line-height: 30px;
  font-size: 12px;
}
.copilot-comp__input-wrapper .copilot-comp__input-ai-icon {
  align-self: flex-start;
  margin-top: 3px;
}
.copilot-comp__input-wrapper .copilot-comp__input-ai-icon .copilot-icon {
  width: 20px;
  height: 20px;
}
.copilot-comp__input-wrapper .copilot-comp__input-roadster-editor {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  width: calc(100% - 50px);
  min-height: 22px;
  margin-left: 10px;
}
.copilot-comp__input-wrapper .copilot-comp__input-roadster-editor.with-at {
  width: calc(100% - 86px);
}
.copilot-comp__input-wrapper .copilot-comp__input .ai-button-divider {
  min-width: 1px;
  width: 1px;
  height: 18px;
  display: flex;
  align-self: flex-end;
  background: var(--line-divider-default);
  margin: 0 8px 4px 8px;
}
.copilot-comp__input-wrapper .copilot-comp__input .copilot-comp__at-icon {
  display: flex;
  align-self: flex-end;
  margin: 1px 0px;
  width: 24px;
  height: 24px;
  border-radius: 6px;
}
.copilot-comp__input-wrapper .copilot-comp__input .copilot-comp__at-icon .ud__button {
  color: var(--icon-n3);
}
.copilot-comp__input-wrapper .copilot-comp__input .copilot-comp__at-icon .copilot-comp__active {
  color: var(--colorful-blue);
}
.copilot-comp__input-wrapper .copilot-comp__input .copilot-comp__send-icon {
  align-self: flex-end;
}
.copilot-comp__input-wrapper .copilot-comp__input .copilot-comp__send-icon .copilot-comp__disabled {
  cursor: not-allowed;
}
.copilot-comp__input-wrapper .copilot-comp__input .copilot-comp__send-icon .copilot-comp__disabled path {
  fill: var(--icon-disabled);
}
.copilot-comp__input-wrapper .copilot-comp__input .copilot-comp__send-icon .copilot-comp__disabled:active {
  background: var(--fill-hover);
}
.copilot-comp__input-wrapper .copilot-comp__input .ud__textarea textarea {
  border: none;
  background-color: transparent;
  resize: none;
  padding: 0 0 0 10px;
}
.copilot-comp__input-wrapper .copilot-comp__input .copilot-comp__is-writing-text {
  flex-grow: 1;
  font-size: 14px;
  color: var(--text-caption);
  margin-left: 10px;
}
.copilot-comp__input-wrapper .copilot-comp__input .copilot-comp__key-event-container {
  display: flex;
}
.copilot-comp__input-wrapper .copilot-comp__input .copilot-comp__key-event-container .copilot-comp__key-event-item {
  width: max-content;
  color: var(--text-caption);
}
.copilot-comp__input-wrapper .copilot-comp__input .copilot-comp__key-event-container .copilot-comp__key-event-item span {
  margin-left: 4px;
  color: var(--text-placeholder);
}
.copilot-comp__input-wrapper .copilot-comp__input .copilot-comp__key-event-container .copilot-comp__key-event-space {
  width: 0;
  height: 100%;
  margin-left: 10px;
}
.copilot-comp__input-wrapper .copilot-comp__input .selection-cursor.animation-active {
  animation: ai-input-blink 1s steps(1) infinite;
}
.copilot-comp__input-wrapper .copilot-comp__input .selection-cursor.display-cursor {
  display: unset;
  opacity: 1;
}
.copilot-comp__input-wrapper .copilot-comp__input .editor-kit-container {
  font-size: 16px;
  line-height: 1.625;
  outline: none;
  position: relative;
}
.copilot-comp__input-wrapper .copilot-comp__input .editor-kit-container[data-placeholder]::before {
  content: attr(data-placeholder);
}
.copilot-comp__input-wrapper .copilot-comp__input .editor-kit-container::before {
  content: attr(data-placeholder);
  pointer-events: none;
  position: absolute;
  color: #bbbfc4;
  height: 0;
}
.copilot-comp__input-wrapper .copilot-comp__input .editor-kit-container .ace-line {
  margin-bottom: 8px;
  margin-top: 8px;
}
.copilot-comp__input-wrapper .copilot-comp__input .editor-kit-container .ace-line .not-display-enter {
  position: absolute;
  display: inline-block;
  width: 0;
  height: 0;
}
.copilot-comp__input-wrapper .copilot-comp__input .editor-kit-container .ace-line:first-child {
  margin-top: 0;
}
.copilot-comp__input-wrapper .copilot-comp__input .editor-kit-container .ace-table td .ace-line:first-child {
  margin-top: 0;
}
.copilot-comp__input-wrapper .copilot-comp__input .editor-kit-container .ace-table td .ace-line:last-child {
  margin-bottom: 0;
}
.copilot-comp__input-wrapper .copilot-comp__input .outterdocbody {
  position: 'relative';
  overflow-y: 'auto';
}
.copilot-comp__input-wrapper .copilot-comp__input .doc-resize-placeholder {
  position: absolute;
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  top: -120%;
  left: 0;
  user-select: none;
  visibility: hidden;
}
.copilot-comp__input-wrapper .copilot-comp__input .selection-cursor {
  visibility: visible;
  position: absolute;
  caret-color: var(--AI-cursor);
  background-color: var(--AI-cursor) !important;
  left: 0;
  top: 0;
  width: 1px;
  height: 20px;
  opacity: 0;
  z-index: 0;
  pointer-events: none;
  display: none;
}
.copilot-comp__input-wrapper .copilot-comp__input .selection-cursor.active {
  display: unset;
  animation: ai-input-blink 1s steps(1) infinite;
}
@keyframes ai-input-blink {
  0% {
    opacity: 1;
  }
  50% {
    opacity: 0;
  }
  100% {
    opacity: 1;
  }
}
</style><style type="text/css">.copilot-comp__feedback .ud__modal__content {
  box-shadow: var(--shadow-s5-down);
}
.copilot-comp__feedback .ud__modal__body {
  padding: 0 24px 0;
  margin: 0;
}
.copilot-comp__feedback .copilot-comp__feedback-btn-container {
  display: flex;
  gap: 8px;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  margin-bottom: 24px;
}
.copilot-comp__feedback .copilot-comp__feedback-btn-container .copilot-comp__feedback-btn.selected {
  color: var(--primary-content-default);
  background: var(--btn-se-bg-pri-focus);
  border-color: var(--primary-content-default);
}
.copilot-comp__feedback .copilot-comp__feedback-text-area {
  width: 312px;
  margin-bottom: 12px;
}
.copilot-comp__feedback .copilot-comp__feedback-text-area textarea {
  resize: none;
}
.copilot-comp__feedback .copilot-comp__feedback-thanks {
  font-size: 12px;
  line-height: 20px;
  color: var(--text-title);
}
.copilot-comp__feedback .ud__modal__footer {
  padding: 24px;
}
.copilot-comp__feedback .ud__modal__footer button {
  margin-left: 12px;
}
@media screen and (max-width: 360px) {
  .copilot-comp__feedback {
    max-width: calc(100vw - 16px);
    margin-left: 8px !important;
    margin-right: 8px !important;
    margin-top: 8px;
    margin-bottom: 8px;
  }
  .copilot-comp__feedback .copilot-comp__feedback-text-area {
    max-width: 100%;
  }
  .copilot-comp__feedback .copilot-comp__feedback-text-area textarea {
    resize: none;
  }
}
</style><link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="./AI服务详细设计文档_files/30704.82740a8f.css"><link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="./AI服务详细设计文档_files/21326.7bbb9dfb.css"><link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="./AI服务详细设计文档_files/22552.158554fd.css"><link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="./AI服务详细设计文档_files/56616.8b94a1fc.css"><link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="./AI服务详细设计文档_files/17655.4521ce7a.css"><link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="./AI服务详细设计文档_files/clipboard_security.0d34ecf7.css"><link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="./AI服务详细设计文档_files/52887.45823cd2.css"><link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="./AI服务详细设计文档_files/navigation_bar.91c11793.css"><link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="./AI服务详细设计文档_files/suite_app_content.1343a02f.css"><style>.__scribing-container-root__ {
  position: absolute;
  top: 0;
  left: 0;
  border: none;
  margin: 0;
  padding: 0;
  pointer-events: none;
  box-sizing: border-box;
}

.__scribing-container-position__ {
  box-sizing: border-box;
  position: relative;
  pointer-events: none;
  overflow: scroll;
  border: 0;
  border-radius: 0;
  padding: 0;
  margin: 0;
}

.__scribing-container-position__::-webkit-scrollbar {
  display: none;
}

.__scribing-sdk-underline__ {
  transition: background-color 200ms;
}

/* CSS 画波浪线 https://www.cnblogs.com/tianma3798/p/9717759.html */
.__scribing-sdk-underline__::after {
  content: '';
  position: absolute;
  bottom: -2px;
  width: 100%;
  height: 3px;

  background-size: 5px 3px;
  background-repeat: repeat-x, repeat-x;
  background-image: url('data:image/png;base64,');
}

.__scribing-sdk-underline-dotted__ {
  /*
   * 使用自定义的border来实现虚线效果，如果使用 background-image 会在跨越多行的时候不出现划线
   * http://tiantang-tt.github.io/2018/11/12/custom-dashed-border-in-css/
   * https://css-tricks.com/almanac/properties/b/border-image/
   */
  border-width: 0; /* 兼容safari */
  border-bottom: 1px solid;
  border-image-slice: 1;
  border-image-source: repeating-linear-gradient(
    90deg,
    rgba(31, 35, 41, .6),
    rgba(31, 35, 41, .6) 1px,
    transparent 0,
    transparent 3px
  );
}

/* 调试相关的样式 */
.__scribing-sdk-debug__ .__scribing-container-position__:after {
  content: "";
  position: absolute;
  left: 0;
  right: 0;
  top: 0;
  bottom: 0;
  border-radius: 2px;
  border: 1px solid rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2);
}

.__scribing-sdk-debug__ .__scribing-sdk-scribing__::before{
  content: "";
  position: absolute;
  left: 0;
  right: 0;
  top: 0;
  bottom: 0;
  border-radius: 2px;
  border: 1px solid rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2);
}
</style><link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="./AI服务详细设计文档_files/23119.6433d240.css"><link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="./AI服务详细设计文档_files/ccm_drive_entry_config.95313241.css"><style>.gpf-biz-suite-custom-icon__icon-emoji {
  font-size: var(--icon-size);
  font-family: 'Segoe UI Emoji', 'Segoe UI Symbol', 'Segoe UI', 'Apple Color Emoji';
  color: var(--text-title);
}
.gpf-biz-suite-custom-icon__icon-emoji.mac {
  font-family: 'Apple Color Emoji', 'Segoe UI Emoji', 'Segoe UI Symbol', 'Segoe UI';
}
.gpf-biz-suite-custom-icon__icon-emoji.safari,
.gpf-biz-suite-custom-icon__icon-emoji.windows {
  font-size: calc(var(--icon-size) - 2px);
  transform: translateY(-1px);
}
.gpf-biz-suite-custom-icon__icon-image {
  width: var(--icon-size);
  height: var(--icon-size);
}
</style><style>.gpf-biz-suite-custom-icon__icon-wrapper {
  display: inline-flex;
  flex: none;
  justify-content: center;
  align-items: center;
  width: var(--wrapper-size);
  height: var(--wrapper-size);
}
.gpf-biz-suite-custom-icon__icon-wrapper-background {
  border-radius: 50%;
  background-color: var(--color);
}
.gpf-biz-suite-custom-icon__icon-wrapper-shortcut {
  position: relative;
}
.gpf-biz-suite-custom-icon__icon-default {
  width: var(--icon-size);
  height: var(--icon-size);
}
.gpf-biz-suite-custom-icon__icon-default--link {
  color: var(--text-link-normal);
}
.gpf-biz-suite-custom-icon__icon-default--disabled {
  color: var(--N600);
}
</style><style type="text/css">body .space-sdk__space-container-global-loading--wrapper,body .space-sdk__space-container-global-loading--wrapper>.ud__loading__container{flex:1;display:flex;overflow:hidden}</style><style media="screen">.organization-name-wrap {
  width: 100%;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  position: relative;
}
.organization-name-wrap-title {
  overflow: hidden;
  white-space: nowrap;
  text-overflow: ellipsis;
}
.organization-name-wrap-left,
.organization-name-wrap-right {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
}
.organization-name-wrap-tag {
  flex-shrink: 10000;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  margin-left: 4px;
  box-sizing: content-box;
}
</style><style media="screen">.gpf-biz-mention__mention-panel {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
}
.gpf-biz-mention__mention-panel .larkw-mention-panel {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  flex: 1;
  max-width: inherit !important;
  min-height: inherit !important;
}
.gpf-biz-mention__mention-panel .larkw-mention-panel__list {
  min-height: 0px !important;
}
.gpf-biz-mention__mention-panel .larkw-mention-panel__footer {
  flex-shrink: 0;
}
.gpf-biz-mention__mention-panel .larkw-skeleton-mention-group > .larkw-skeleton-mention-option {
  box-sizing: content-box;
  color: var(--bg-body);
}
.gpf-biz-mention__mention-panel .gpf-biz-suite-custom-icon__icon-wrapper {
  display: flex;
}
.gpf-biz-mention__mention-panel-loading {
  position: absolute;
  height: 100%;
  width: 100%;
  display: none;
  justify-content: center;
  align-items: center;
  background-color: rgba(var(--N00-raw), 60%);
}
</style><style media="screen">.gpf-biz-mention__mention-panel-h5 {
  position: fixed;
  left: 0;
  width: 100vw;
  z-index: 1000;
}
.gpf-biz-mention__mention-panel-h5 .gpf-biz-mention__mention-top {
  padding: 11px 16px;
  background-color: var(--bg-body);
  border-top-left-radius: 16px;
  border-top-right-radius: 16px;
  box-shadow: var(--shadow-s4-up);
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: space-between;
  position: relative;
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--line-divider-default);
  font-size: 16px;
  touch-action: none;
}
.gpf-biz-mention__mention-panel-h5 .gpf-biz-mention__mention-top-cancel {
  font-weight: 400;
  text-align: left;
}
.gpf-biz-mention__mention-panel-h5 .gpf-biz-mention__mention-top-title {
  font-weight: 500;
  position: absolute;
  left: 50%;
  transform: translateX(-50%);
}
.gpf-biz-mention__mention-panel-h5 .gpf-biz-mention__mention-panel {
  width: 100vw;
}
</style><style media="screen">.gpf-biz-file-preview-pure {
  overflow: hidden;
  height: 100%;
}
.gpf-biz-file-preview-pure-wrap {
  position: relative;
  width: 100%;
  overflow: hidden;
  font-size: 0;
}
.gpf-biz-file-preview-pure-wrap-center {
  height: 100%;
  display: flex!important;
  justify-content: center;
  align-items: center;
}
.gpf-biz-file-preview-pure-wrap-icon {
  height: 100%;
}
.gpf-biz-file-preview-pure-wrap:after {
  content: '';
  position: absolute;
  top: 0;
  left: 0;
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  z-index: 1;
  background-color: var(--fill-img-mask);
}
.gpf-biz-file-preview-pure-img {
  margin: 0 auto;
  width: 100%;
  background: var(--static-white);
  user-select: none;
  -webkit-user-drag: none;
}
.gpf-biz-file-preview-pure-full-height {
  width: auto;
  height: 100%;
}
.gpf-biz-file-preview-pure-new-default {
  max-width: 100%;
  max-height: 84px;
  height: auto;
  width: auto;
  padding: 0 8px;
}
.gpf-biz-file-preview-pure-img-preview {
  object-fit: cover;
  width: auto;
  height: auto;
  min-width: 60px;
  min-height: 60px;
  max-width: 100%;
  max-height: 100%;
}
.gpf-biz-file-preview-pure-img-icon {
  position: relative;
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  min-height: 173px;
  overflow: hidden;
  background: var(--static-white);
  display: flex;
  justify-content: center;
  align-items: center;
}
</style><style media="screen">.gpf-biz-file-preview-loading {
  padding: 14px 12px;
  min-width: 344px;
  height: 48px;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
}
</style><style media="screen">.gpf-biz-file-preview-embed-img {
  margin: 0 auto;
  padding: 12px 12px 0;
  text-align: center;
  box-sizing: content-box;
  font-size: 0;
  background-color: var(--bg-float);
}
.gpf-biz-file-preview-embed-img-content {
  background-color: var(--bg-float);
}
.gpf-biz-file-preview-embed-img-content-img {
  width: 320px !important;
}
.gpf-biz-file-preview-embed-img-content-img.gpf-biz-file-preview-pure-img-preview,
.gpf-biz-file-preview-embed-img-content-img.gpf-biz-file-preview-pure-full-height,
.gpf-biz-file-preview-embed-img-content-img.gpf-biz-file-preview-pure-new-default {
  width: auto!important;
  max-width: 320px;
  max-height: 320px;
}
.gpf-biz-file-preview-embed-img-loading {
  padding: 13px 12px;
  height: 48px;
  box-sizing: border-box;
}
.gpf-biz-file-preview-embed-img-error {
  max-width: 320px;
}
.gpf-biz-file-preview-embed-img-icon {
  width: 320px;
  height: 320px;
}
.gpf-biz-file-preview-embed-img-icon .gpf-biz-file-preview-embed-img-content-img {
  max-height: 84px;
}
.gpf-biz-file-preview-embed-error {
  width: 100%;
  max-width: 320px;
}
.gpf-biz-file-preview-embed-time {
  height: 37px;
  line-height: 18px;
  padding: 8px 16px 10px;
  color: var(--text-caption);
  font-size: 12px;
  text-align: right;
  background-color: var(--bg-float-overlay);
  border-bottom-left-radius: 8px;
  border-bottom-right-radius: 8px;
  border-top: 1px solid var(--line-divider-default);
}
</style><style type="text/css">.custom-space-icon{align-items:center;background-color:var(--bg-float);border:solid var(--theme-color);border-radius:.25em;border-width:.5px;box-sizing:border-box;display:flex;font-size:16px;height:1em;justify-content:center;min-width:1em;width:1em}.custom-space-icon .custom_space_icon__letter{color:var(--theme-color);font-weight:500;letter-spacing:0;line-height:1em;text-align:center;text-transform:uppercase}.custom-space-icon .gpf-biz-suite-custom-icon__icon-image,.custom-space-icon .gpf-biz-suite-custom-icon__icon-wrapper,.custom-space-icon svg{font-size:inherit}</style><style>.gpf-biz-suite-custom-icon__panel-wrapper {
  background: var(--bg-float);
  position: relative;
  width: 456px;
}
.gpf-biz-suite-custom-icon__panel-wrapper .ud__tabs__tab-bar-nav {
  margin-bottom: 0;
}
.gpf-biz-suite-custom-icon__panel-wrapper .ud__tabs__tab-bar-wrap {
  padding-left: 24px;
}
.gpf-biz-suite-custom-icon__panel-wrapper .ud__tabs__tab-bar-wrap .ud__tabs__tab {
  padding: 20px 0 12px;
  font-weight: 400;
}
.gpf-biz-suite-custom-icon__panel-wrapper .ud__tabs__tab-bar-wrap .ud__tabs__tab--active {
  color: var(--primary-pri-500);
}
.gpf-biz-suite-custom-icon__panel-wrapper .ud__tabs__tab-bar-ink::before {
  background-color: var(--primary-pri-500);
}
.gpf-biz-suite-custom-icon__panel-wrapper em-emoji-picker {
  box-shadow: none;
  height: var(--inner-height);
  min-height: 380px;
  --border-radius: 0;
  --category-icon-size: 18px;
}
@media screen and (max-height: 500px) {
  .gpf-biz-suite-custom-icon__panel-wrapper em-emoji-picker {
    height: 380px;
  }
}
.gpf-biz-suite-custom-icon__panel-wrapper .ud__tabs__pane {
  height: var(--inner-height);
}
@media screen and (max-height: 500px) {
  .gpf-biz-suite-custom-icon__panel-wrapper .ud__tabs__pane {
    height: 380px;
  }
}
.gpf-biz-suite-custom-icon__panel-wrapper.support-random .random-pick-btn {
  position: absolute;
  width: 36px;
  min-width: 36px;
  height: 36px;
  top: 68px;
  left: 394px;
}
.gpf-biz-suite-custom-icon__panel-wrapper.support-random .random-pick-btn svg {
  width: 18px;
  height: 18px;
  color: var(--icon-n2);
}
.gpf-biz-suite-custom-icon__panel-wrapper.support-random.emoji-only {
  padding-top: 10px;
}
.gpf-biz-suite-custom-icon__panel-wrapper.support-random.emoji-only .random-pick-btn {
  top: 24px;
}
.gpf-biz-suite-custom-icon__panel-wrapper-pure-filled {
  width: 380px;
}
.gpf-biz-suite-custom-icon__remove-btn.ud__button {
  position: absolute;
  top: 18px;
  right: 21px;
  color: var(--text-title);
}
.gpf-biz-suite-custom-icon__remove-btn.ud__button--text:disabled {
  color: var(--text-disabled);
  background: transparent;
}
.gpf-biz-suite-custom-icon__picker-loading {
  height: var(--inner-height);
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
}
@media screen and (max-height: 500px) {
  .gpf-biz-suite-custom-icon__picker-loading {
    height: 380px;
  }
}
</style><style>.gpf-biz-suite-custom-icon__popover.ud__popover {
  max-width: 456px;
  min-height: 380px;
}

    @media print {
      .gpf-biz-action-manager-forbidden-placeholder {
        width: 100%;
        height: 100%;
        display: flex;
        flex-direction: column;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: center;
        overflow: hidden;
        background-color: var(--bg-body-overlay);
      }

      .gpf-biz-action-manager-forbidden-placeholder-img {
        width: min(50%, 120px);
        min-width: 48px;
        height: auto;
        margin-bottom: 4px;
      }

      .gpf-biz-action-manager-forbidden-placeholder-desc {
        font-size: 14px;
        line-height: 22px;
        color: var(--text-caption);
      }
    }
  </style><style type="text/css" id="refer-block-print">@media print {}</style><script src="./AI服务详细设计文档_files/browser.cn(1).js.下载" crossorigin="anonymous"></script><script src="./AI服务详细设计文档_files/browser.cn(2).js.下载" crossorigin="anonymous"></script><style media="screen">.organization-name-wrap {
  width: 100%;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  position: relative;
}
.organization-name-wrap-title {
  overflow: hidden;
  white-space: nowrap;
  text-overflow: ellipsis;
}
.organization-name-wrap-left,
.organization-name-wrap-right {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
}
.organization-name-wrap-tag {
  flex-shrink: 10000;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  margin-left: 4px;
  box-sizing: content-box;
}
</style><style media="screen">.ud-illustration--wrapper {
  display: flex;
  height: 100%;
  width: 100%;
  flex-direction: column;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
}
.ud-illustration--icon {
  margin-bottom: 16px;
}
.ud-illustration--title,
.ud-illustration--desc {
  max-width: 248px;
}
.ud-illustration--title {
  font-weight: 500;
  font-size: 16px;
  line-height: 24px;
  color: var(--text-title);
}
.ud-illustration--desc {
  font-size: 14px;
  color: var(--text-caption);
}
</style><style media="screen">.gpf-user-popover .ud__popover-content {
  border: none;
  box-shadow: 0 3px 12px 2px var(--shadow-default-sm);
  background-color: transparent;
}
.gpf-user-popover_loading {
  width: 320px;
  height: 48px;
  background-color: var(--bg-body);
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
}
.gpf-user-popover .larkw-userprofile__profile-manager {
  transform: translateZ(0);
}
</style><style type="text/css" title="dynamicsyntax"></style><style type="text/css" class="adit-style">.innerdocbody.adit-container {
  line-height: 1.6;
  outline: none;
  position: relative;
}
.innerdocbody.adit-container::before {
  content: attr(data-placeholder);
  pointer-events: none;
  position: absolute;
  left: 0;
  top: 0;
  color: #bbbfc4;
  height: 0;
}
.innerdocbody.adit-container .ace-line .not-display-enter {
  position: absolute;
  display: inline-block;
  width: 0;
  height: 0;
}
.doc-resize-placeholder {
  position: absolute;
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  top: -120%;
  left: 0;
  user-select: none;
  visibility: hidden;
}
</style><style type="text/css" class="adit-style">.innerdocbody {
  line-height: 1.625;
  outline: none;
  box-sizing: border-box;
  width: 100%;
  overflow: visible;
}
</style><script src="./AI服务详细设计文档_files/browser.cn(3).js.下载" crossorigin="anonymous"></script><style type="text/css">.menu_7c49f {
  position: fixed;
  z-index: 2147483647;
  padding: 2px 3px;
  font-size: 14px;
  min-width: 180px;
  box-sizing: border-box;
  border-radius: 8px;
  background-color: white;
  border: 1px solid #dee0e3;
  box-shadow: 0 4px 8px -8px rgba(31, 35, 41, 0.06), 0 6px 12px 0 rgba(31, 35, 41, 0.04), 0 8px 24px 8px rgba(31, 35, 41, 0.04);
  color: #1f2329;
  /** dark theme */
}
.menu_7c49f .menuItem_7c49f {
  padding: 0px 8px;
  cursor: pointer;
  transition: background-color 0.2s;
  border-radius: 6px;
  white-space: nowrap;
  height: 32px;
  line-height: 32px;
  box-sizing: border-box;
}
.menu_7c49f .menuItem_7c49f:hover {
  background-color: rgba(31, 35, 41, 0.08);
}
.menu_7c49f .menuItem_7c49f .icon_7c49f {
  margin-right: 8px;
  color: #646a73;
}
.menu_7c49f .menuItem_7c49f .icon_7c49f svg {
  vertical-align: -0.14em;
  display: inline-block;
}
.menu_7c49f[data-theme='dark'] {
  background-color: #2e2e2e;
  border-color: #5f5f5f;
  box-shadow: 0 4px 8px 0 rgba(31, 35, 41, 0.1);
  color: #f0f0f0;
}
.menu_7c49f[data-theme='dark'] .menuItem_7c49f:hover {
  background: rgba(240, 240, 240, 0.08);
}
.menu_7c49f[data-theme='dark'] .menuItem_7c49f .icon_7c49f {
  color: #e8e8e8;

  left: 0;
}
.gpf-biz-action-manager-banner-content-text {

}
.gpf-biz-action-manager-banner-content-link {

type="text/css" class="editor-kit-plugin-abbreviation-style"></style><style type="text/css">.menu_7c49f {
  position: fixed;
  z-index: 2147483647;
  padding: 2px 3px;
  font-size: 14px;
  min-width: 180px;
  box-sizing: border-box;
  border-radius: 8px;
  background-color: white;
  border: 1px solid #dee0e3;
  box-shadow: 0 4px 8px -8px rgba(31, 35, 41, 0.06), 0 6px 12px 0 rgba(31, 35, 41, 0.04), 0 8px 24px 8px rgba(31, 35, 41, 0.04);
  color: #1f2329;
  /** dark theme */
}
.menu_7c49f .menuItem_7c49f {
  padding: 0px 8px;
  cursor: pointer;
  transition: background-color 0.2s;
  border-radius: 6px;
  white-space: nowrap;
  height: 32px;
  line-height: 32px;
  box-sizing: border-box;
}
.menu_7c49f .menuItem_7c49f:hover {
  background-color: rgba(31, 35, 41, 0.08);
}
.menu_7c49f .menuItem_7c49f .icon_7c49f {
  margin-right: 8px;
  color: #646a73;
}
.menu_7c49f .menuItem_7c49f .icon_7c49f svg {
  vertical-align: -0.14em;
  display: inline-block;
}
.menu_7c49f[data-theme='dark'] {
  background-color: #2e2e2e;
  border-color: #5f5f5f;
  box-shadow: 0 4px 8px 0 rgba(31, 35, 41, 0.1);
  color: #f0f0f0;
}
.menu_7c49f[data-theme='dark'] .menuItem_7c49f:hover {
  background: rgba(240, 240, 240, 0.08);
}
.menu_7c49f[data-theme='dark'] .menuItem_7c49f .icon_7c49f {
  color: #e8e8e8;
}
</style><style data-emotion="universe-icon" data-s="">
.universe-icon {
  display: inline-block;
  font-style: normal;
  line-height: 0;
  text-align: center;
  text-transform: none;
  text-rendering: optimizeLegibility;
  -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
  -moz-osx-font-smoothing: grayscale;
}

.universe-icon > * {
  line-height: 1;
}

.universe-icon svg {
  display: inline-block;
  vertical-align: -0.14em;
}

.universe-icon::before {
  display: none;
}</style><style type="text/css">@keyframes popupSlideUpIn{0%{opacity:0;transform:translateY(-8px);transform-origin:0 0}to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0);transform-origin:0 0}}@keyframes .search-result-item-title{display:flex;align-items:center;font-weight:700;color:var(--text-title);font-size:14px;line-height:22px}.search-result-item .search-result-item-extra,.search-result-item .search-result-item-subtitle,.search-result-item .search-result-item-summary{color:var(--text-caption);font-size:12px;line-height:20px}.search-result-item .search-extra-tooltip-text:hover{color:#646a73}.search-result-item .highlight-tag{color:var(--primary-pri-500)}.search-result-item .bold-tag{font-weight:700}.search-result-item .style-tag{color:inherit}.search-result-item .style-tag.grey{color:var(--text-placeholder)}.search-result-item .search-extra-icon{display:inline-flex;margin-right:4px;vertical-align:middle}.search-result-item .search-tag{margin-left:4px;cursor:pointer}.search-result-item .search-tag.ud__tag.ud__tag-xs{transition:none}.search-extra-tooltip-content{max-width:296px;text-overflow:ellipsis;overflow:hidden;display:-webkit-box;-webkit-line-clamp:5;-webkit-box-orient:vertical}.search-official-tag_popover{z-index:1200}.search-official-tag_popover .ud__popover-content{color:#045d51;padding:10px 16px 12px 20px;min-width:248px;max-width:316px;border-radius:10px}.search-official-tag_popover .ud__popover__overlay-title{font-size:16px;line-height:24px}.search-official-tag_popover .ud__popover__overlay-content{margin-top:0;font-size:12px;line-height:20px;color:#8f959e}</style><style   z-index: 10000;
}
</style><style type="text/css" id="baike-sdk">
.larkw-aslCard-baikeCard-dropdown-overlay.ud__dropdown,
.larkw-aslCard-baikeCard-tooltip-overlay.ud__tooltip {
  z-index: 10000;
}
</style><link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="./AI服务详细设计文档_files/box_comment_v2.c1e1d96a.css"><link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="./AI服务详细设计文档_files/box-version-preview-modal.98f77a93.css"><style media="screen">.feed-message .message-list-item_new .list-item-right .message-at:after {
  content: ' ';
  display: inline-block;
  width: 5px;
  height: 5px;
  background: var(--R500-BG);
  border-radius: 50%;
  margin: 0 6px;
}
.feed-message .message-list-item {
  padding-bottom: 20px;
  border-bottom: 0.5px solid var(--N50-BD);
  cursor: pointer;
}
.feed-message .message-list-item .list-item-left {
  flex: 0 0 auto;
  padding: 20px 9px 0 20px;
}
.feed-message .message-list-item .list-item-left .avatar {
  width: 28px;
  height: 28px;
  border-radius: 50%;
}
.feed-message .message-list-item .list-item-hat {
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--N50-BD);
  border-radius: 4px 4px 0 0;
  padding: 0 12px;
  height: 39px;
  background-color: var(--bg-body-overlay);
  font-size: 12px;
  line-height: 39px;
  color: var(--text-placeholder);
}
.feed-message .message-list-item .list-item-content {
  display: flex;
  align-items: flex-start;
}
.feed-message .message-list-item .list-item-right {
  flex: 1 1 auto;
  padding-top: 17px;
  line-height: 1.5;
  margin-right: 20px;
  font-size: 12px;
  position: relative;
  display: block;
  height: 100%;
}
.feed-message .message-list-item .list-item-right .message-title {
  color: var(--text-disabled);
  margin-bottom: 6px;
}
.feed-message .message-list-item .list-item-right .message-title .name {
  margin-right: 15px;
}
.feed-message .message-list-item .list-item-right .date {
  opacity: 0;
}
.feed-message .message-list-item .list-item-right .message-source {
  border-left: 2px solid transparent;
  padding-left: 8px;
  margin: 6px 0;
  color: var(--text-disabled);
  position: relative;
  -webkit-box-orient: vertical;
  display: -webkit-box;
  -webkit-line-clamp: 2;
  overflow: hidden;
}
.feed-message .message-list-item .list-item-right .message-source::before {
  content: ' ';
  position: absolute;
  top: 2px;
  bottom: 2px;
  width: 2px;
  background: var(--bg-base);
  left: 0;
}
.feed-message .message-list-item .list-item-right .message-text {
  color: var(--N700-FG);
  -webkit-box-orient: vertical;
  display: -webkit-box;
  -webkit-line-clamp: 3;
  overflow: hidden;
}
.feed-message .message-list-item .list-item-right .message-at {
  margin-top: 3px;
  width: 100%;
}
.feed-message .message-list-item .list-item-right .message-time {
  opacity: 1;
  width: 100%;
  color: var(--text-caption);
}
.feed-message .message-list-item:hover .date {
  opacity: 1;
}
.feed-message .message-list-new-item {
  margin: 0 10px 20px;
  background: var(--bg-float);
  border-radius: 4px;
  border: 1px solid var(--line-border-card);
  width: 270px;
}
.feed-message .message-list-new-item .list-item-left {
  padding-left: 14px;
  width: 32px;
  height: 32px;
  position: relative;
  box-sizing: content-box;
}
.feed-message .message-list-new-item .list-item-left svg {
  position: absolute;
}
.feed-message .message-list-new-item .list-item-left .avatar {
  width: 32px;
  height: 32px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  overflow: hidden;
}
.feed-message .message-loading-wrapper {
  position: absolute;
  z-index: 1;
  top: 0;
  right: 0;
  bottom: 0;
  left: 0;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  background-color: var(--bg-body);
}
</style><style media="screen">.feed-message .comment-panel__tip-wrapper {
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--line-border-card);
  border-radius: 4px 4px 0 0;
  padding: 0 12px;
  height: 36px;
  background-color: var(--bg-body);
  display: flex;
  justify-content: space-between;
}
.feed-message .comment-panel__tip-wrapper button {
  font-size: 12px;
  color: var(--text-link-normal);
  cursor: pointer;
  border: none;
  background: none;
}
.feed-message .comment-panel__tip-container {
  line-height: 36px;
  font-size: 12px;
  color: var(--text-caption);
}
.feed-message .comment-list-item {
  margin: 0 10px 20px;
  background: var(--bg-float);
  border-radius: 4px;
  border: 1px solid var(--line-border-card);
  width: 270px;
  padding-bottom: 6px;
  cursor: pointer;
}
</style><style media="screen">.feed-message .error-box {
  position: absolute;
  top: 50%;
  left: 50%;
  transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
  font-size: 12px;
  color: var(--text-caption);
  text-align: center;
}
.feed-message .error-box-svg {
  width: 60px;
  height: 60px;
  display: inline-block;
  margin-bottom: 11px;
}
</style><link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="./AI服务详细设计文档_files/56750.df93723d.css"><link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="./AI服务详细设计文档_files/platform_fe_permission_embed.1ad32580.css"><link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="./AI服务详细设计文档_files/biz_mention_panel.940a3cb3.css"><style type="text/css" id="baike-sdk">
.larkw-aslCard-baikeCard-dropdown-overlay.ud__dropdown,
.larkw-aslCard-baikeCard-tooltip-overlay.ud__tooltip {
  z-index: 10000;
}
</style><style media="screen">.gpf-user-popover .ud__popover-content {
  border: none;
  box-shadow: 0 3px 12px 2px var(--shadow-default-sm);
  background-color: transparent;
}
.gpf-user-popover_loading {
  width: 320px;
  height: 48px;
  background-color: var(--bg-body);
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
}
.gpf-user-popover .larkw-userprofile__profile-manager {
  transform: translateZ(0);
}
</style><style type="text/css" id="baike-sdk">
.larkw-aslCard-baikeCard-dropdown-overlay.ud__dropdown,
.larkw-aslCard-baikeCard-tooltip-overlay.ud__tooltip {
  z-index: 10000;
}
</style><link href="./AI服务详细设计文档_files/927.css" rel="stylesheet" type="text/css"><link href="./AI服务详细设计文档_files/__federation_expose_default_export.css" rel="stylesheet" type="text/css"><style id="layout-suite-style">.xcenter{justify-content:center}.rowview,.xcenter{align-items:center;box-sizing:border-box;display:flex;flex-direction:row}.rowview{justify-content:flex-start}.rowview-h-center{justify-content:center}.rowview-h-right{justify-content:flex-end}.rowview-h-around{justify-content:space-around}.rowview-h-between{justify-content:space-between}.rowview-v-top{align-items:flex-start}.rowview-v-bottom{align-items:flex-end}.columnview{box-sizing:border-box;display:flex;flex-direction:column}.columnview-h-center{align-items:center}.columnview-v-center{justify-content:center}.columnview-h-right{align-items:flex-end}.columnview-v-bottom{justify-content:flex-end}.columnview-v-around{justify-content:space-around}.columnview-v-between{justify-content:space-between}.slotrowview>:last-child{margin-right:0}.slotcolumnview>:last-child{margin-bottom:0}.gridbox{display:grid}.child-mgr1-n>*{margin-right:var(--mgr1)}.child-mgr2-n>*{margin-right:var(--mgr2)}.child-mgb1-n>*{margin-bottom:var(--mgb1)}.child-mgb2-n>*{margin-bottom:var(--mgb2)}

.item {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: center;
    align-items: center;
}
.all {
    direction: ltr;
}
.all > * {
    direction: rtl;
}
.hidden {
    display: none;
    transition: width 0.3s linear;
}
.container:hover .hidden {
    width: var(--131b0bc3);
    height: var(--367772ca);
    display: flex;
}
.container {
    position: fixed;
    top:var(--8b7ed71a);

    width: var(--b2ad46e2);
    height: var(--14b33b7e);

.icon:hover {
}
.yd-translate-loader {

    border-radius: 50%;
    height: var(--367772ca);
    width:  var(--131b0bc3);
    animation: spin 0.5s linear infinite;
}
@keyframes spin {
0% { transform: rotate(0deg);
}
100% { transform: rotate(360deg);
}
}
@keyframes append-animate {
from {
        opacity: 0;
}
to {
        opacity: 1;
}
}
.popup {
  animation: popup 0.3s forwards;
}
@keyframes popup {
0% {
    opacity: 0;
    transform: scale(0);
}
100% {
    opacity: 1;
    transform: scale(1);
}
}
